title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 26.
content:
There was a young Lady of Dorking,
    Who bought a large bonnet for walking;
    But its colour and size,
    So bedazzled her eyes,
    That she very soon went back to Dorking.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 26.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
